notes: Beta build 2026.07.22-388 — 📜 Trade history now works on mobile. The History tab was blank on phones (the wide table didn't fit and had no phone layout). Each closed trade now shows as its own card — share, how it exited (🎯/🛑/🪤/market), buy→sell, days held, P/L, and ↩ Undo. The 🗑 Delete-trade tool stays customer-only, as before. Practice money only. Feedback via the ✉ link, top-left.
